--- # This file is processed by Jekyll (front matter present). # The guide list is auto-generated from every page with `guide: true` # in its front matter — no manual editing needed to add new guides. --- {{ site.title | default: "Study Guides" }}

{{ site.title | default: "Study Guides" }}

{{ site.description | default: "Interactive visualizers & notes" }}

{%- assign guides = site.pages | where: "guide", true | sort: "title" -%}
{%- for g in guides %}
{{ g.title }}
{%- if g.description %}
{{ g.description }}
{%- endif %} {%- else %}
No study guides found. Add guide: true to a page's front matter to list it here.
{%- endfor %}

Hosted on GitHub Pages
